Name: Aestari
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 100 years; typical lifespan 600 to 800 years.
Typical Grooming: Hair meticulously arranged around the horn; skin and horn surfaces kept flawless
Ornamentation: Fine metals, ritual threads, house colors, and precisely tailored formalwear

Name: Arochi
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 90 to 120 years.
Typical Grooming: Wind-tousled hair tied back or braided into practical cords
Ornamentation: Woven fibers, trade cords, seed charms, and well-maintained work tools

Name: Borrin
Facial Hair: Sparse or absent; dense scalp hair common
Jaw Structure: Wide and rounded with slight underbite
Complexion: Olive grey, moss green, or muddy brown
Markings: Golden freckles, warts, mud staining, and age creases
Hair Presence: Dense scalp hair; little facial hair
Hair Texture: Tight curls or coarse short coils
Secondary Covering: Leathery ear folds and roughened hands and feet
Limb Proportions: Short-limbed with large hands and feet
Environmental Adaptation: Woodland ruins, damp paths, and foraging grounds
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 15 years; typical lifespan 80 to 110 years.
Typical Grooming: Curls kept short or practical; ears cleaned, folded, or draped beneath hoods and wraps
Ornamentation: Herb bundles, mushroom baskets, walking staves, small bells, keys, pouches, and scavenged charms
Status Indicators: Quality of foraging kit, useful charms, and well-kept ear folds

Name: Brannholt
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late twenties; typical lifespan 100 to 120 years.
Typical Grooming: Hair wrapped, braided, or cropped to manage heat, salt, and sand
Ornamentation: Shade scarves, water tokens, route beads, and heat-weathered workwear

Name: Brasselan
Brow Structure: Heavy, hidden by hair and horn mass
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 40 years; typical lifespan 180 to 250 years.
Typical Grooming: Hair and beard braided into heavy insulating cords; horns cleaned but rarely polished
Ornamentation: Layered insulated robes, structural medallions, and storm or lineage tokens

Name: Broodlings
Markings: Minimal sutures or growths in young examples
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at a stable adolescent form within months; typical lifespan 20 to 40 years unless transformed by a Broodsister.
Typical Grooming: Initially mimic the grooming habits of nearby people; claimed individuals are groomed by their brood
Ornamentation: Borrowed finery, brood-issued tokens, and increasingly visible sutures or iron growths

Name: Cindralis
Complexion: Bronze, pewter, brass, or oxidized copper
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 30 years; typical lifespan 120 to 150 years.
Typical Grooming: Scalp growths left visible; hands, tools, and work surfaces kept meticulously clean
Ornamentation: Fine metalwork, guild badges, annotated tools, and visible marks of craft

Name: Custodian
Eye Color Range: Slate Grey, Dark Brown, Deep Blue, Moss Green, Obsidian
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at fully formed when appointed or awakened; typical lifespan indefinitely, though centuries of service gradually erode their features and identity.
Typical Grooming: No cosmetic grooming; seals, bindings, and eroded surfaces are ritually maintained
Ornamentation: Chains, sealing glyphs, keys, oath tablets, and austere judicial vestments

Name: Delvani
Eye Color Range: Brown, Dark Brown, Hazel, Bronze, Copper, Amber, Moss Green
Secondary Vision Traits: You do not have Darkvision, as humanity’s origins are tied to the daylight, not the dark.
Markings: Visible mineral veins and fracture lines
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late twenties; typical lifespan 100 to 120 years.
Typical Grooming: Thick hair and beards kept practical, often braided away from tools and flame
Ornamentation: Mineral jewelry, hearth tokens, work leathers, and communal craft marks

Name: Dren
Secondary Vision Traits: Your embered eyes grant you Darkvision up to 60 feet.
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 30 years; typical lifespan 250 to 350 years.
Typical Grooming: Minimal hair grooming; ash and heat-striations are cleaned but left unobscured
Ornamentation: Hearth tokens, ash-cloth wraps, forge pieces, and keepsakes from shared shelters

Name: Eidolons
Skin Texture: Stone, metal, wood, cloth, or other vessel material
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at fully formed when a stellar soul enters a vessel; typical lifespan 500 years or more before the soul or vessel fails.
Typical Grooming: Vessel surfaces repaired and maintained according to their material and chosen identity
Ornamentation: Embedded sigils, star symbols, relic fragments, and objects carried across rebirths

Name: Emrelan
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 90 to 130 years.
Typical Grooming: Fibrous hair worn loose or gathered in rhythmic, symmetrical arrangements
Ornamentation: Solar-thread bands, light-catching metals, and restrained infrastructure or office emblems

Name: Hollow
Markings: Darkened eye sockets and visible ribs
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at fully formed rather than born; typical lifespan indefinitely unless destroyed or deprived of sustaining conditions.
Typical Grooming: Long pale hair left plain, evenly cut, or bound by repetitive ritual
Ornamentation: Minimal symbolic bands, faded uniforms, and tokens stripped of personal flourish

Name: Humans
Markings: Freckles, scars, tattoos, and regional variation
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 70 to 90 years.
Typical Grooming: Highly variable by region, occupation, faith, fashion, and personal means
Ornamentation: Jewelry, tattoos, tools, uniforms, religious symbols, and borrowed cultural styles

Name: Imperatum
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 80 to 120 years.
Typical Grooming: Restrained and orderly grooming aligned to role, directive, or institutional custom
Ornamentation: Purposeful insignia, office dress, directional motifs, and objects tied to a directive

Name: Ithilari
Complexion: Permanent lavender, silver, rose, or chromatic hue
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 50 years; typical lifespan 700 to 900 years.
Typical Grooming: Very long luminous hair worn loose and immaculate
Ornamentation: Formal jeweled garments, chromatic accents, and carefully balanced celestial motifs

Name: Kairos
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 90 to 140 years.
Typical Grooming: Dramatic hair and presentation shaped to support the intended emotional effect
Ornamentation: Layered ceremonial robes, luminous jewelry, rhetorical symbols, and statement pieces

Name: Kerevahn
Markings: Runic tattoos, bindings, and anchor scars
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at fully formed or mature by roughly 30 years; typical lifespan several centuries, with survival determined by the strength of their material anchor.
Typical Grooming: Long pale hair left loose or secured with anchoring bindings
Ornamentation: Runic bindings, stabilizing relics, anchor tattoos, and material-world keepsakes

Name: Korrak
Secondary Vision Traits: Your industrial-honed senses grant you Darkvision up to 60 feet. You can see in dim light and darkness as if it were bright light, but only in shades of dull red and gray.
Complexion: Ash grey, rust brown, and charcoal
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 15 years; typical lifespan 50 to 70 years.
Typical Grooming: Dermal plates scraped clean, patched, and sealed; little cosmetic grooming
Ornamentation: Reinforcement straps, industrial badges, salvaged plates, and practical tool harnesses

Name: Luminari
Complexion: Pearl-white, silver-blue, pale gold, or rose
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 80 years; typical lifespan several millennia, often through repeated cycles of return.
Typical Grooming: Weightless hair worn flowing; luminous skin and channels kept clear and unobscured
Ornamentation: Light-like filaments, refined jewelry, halo motifs, and translucent formal garments

Name: Lysorian
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 140 to 180 years.
Typical Grooming: Long straight hair tied back in simple, functional styles
Ornamentation: Archival wraps, writing tools, scholarly seals, and restrained institutional insignia

Name: Mireborn
Markings: Visible pale veins and rib-like striations
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 25 years; typical lifespan 120 to 160 years.
Typical Grooming: Long damp hair left hanging or threaded with marsh and funerary materials
Ornamentation: Funerary threads, reeds, silt-stained keepsakes, and remnants recovered from the drowned

Name: Mistaryn
Markings: Gill slits and ribbed aquatic contours
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 30 years; typical lifespan 180 to 240 years.
Typical Grooming: Skin, gills, fins, and webbing kept hydrated and free of abrasive residue
Ornamentation: Waterproof cords, shell or glass pieces, current-marked fabrics, and aquatic tools

Name: Myrleth
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 4 years; typical lifespan 400 to 500 years.
Typical Grooming: Crystal growths cleaned, tuned, and selectively shaped rather than removed
Ornamentation: Crystals, carved runes, tiny maps, protective marks, and practical lanterns

Name: Naureli
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 30 years; typical lifespan 180 to 260 years.
Typical Grooming: Scales polished and hydrated; fin-crests carefully arranged for formal presentation
Ornamentation: Fine gold patterning, courtly robes, aquatic metals, and crest-emphasizing jewelry

Name: Ordonants
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 20 years; typical lifespan 100 to 150 years.
Typical Grooming: Body panels, crest, and mask-like features kept geometrically immaculate
Ornamentation: Architectural collars, ceremonial staffs, geometric panels, and office-specific regalia

Name: Orphai
Complexion: Ash-pale, faded ink, or muted violet
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 30 years; typical lifespan 180 to 250 years.
Typical Grooming: Fine hair worn loose and allowed to drift; unstable edges are rarely concealed
Ornamentation: Loose adaptive layers, memory tokens, faded inks, and asymmetrical transitional pieces

Name: Oteisha
Complexion: Grey-brown, mossy olive, or muted umber
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 25 years; typical lifespan 160 to 220 years.
Typical Grooming: Wispy or rootlike hair tied back, trimmed, or left naturally fibrous
Ornamentation: Small charms, medicinal bundles, lanterns, spore vessels, and layered weatherwear

Name: Penduran
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 20 years; typical lifespan 110 to 160 years.
Typical Grooming: Smooth scales cleaned and lightly polished; cranial seams left visible
Ornamentation: Compact collars, polished stones, symmetrical bands, and multi-eyed symbolic motifs

Name: Pykari
Secondary Vision Traits: Your connection to the Ashen Spiral grants you Darkvision up to 60 feet. You see the world in shades of deep red and orange, as if embers still smolder in the shadows.
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 15 years; typical lifespan 160 to 200 years.
Typical Grooming: Short curls worn naturally or quickly shaped for travel and heat
Ornamentation: Small ember charms, practical leatherwork, scavenged trinkets, and compact protective gear

Name: Skelbraith
Eye Shape: Primary pair plus small forehead eye
Markings: Salt wear, scars, and a gem-like third eye
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 16 years; typical lifespan 50 to 70 years.
Typical Grooming: Hair kept short or tied back; the third eye is cleaned, covered, or displayed by purpose
Ornamentation: Navigation gems, goggles, storm gear, ship tokens, and third-eye framing jewelry
Status Indicators: Visibility and brightness of the third eye

Name: Teleryn
Markings: Travel scars, tattoos, and ritual ash
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 16 years; typical lifespan 60 to 80 years.
Typical Grooming: Coarse hair worn in braids, knots, shaved patterns, or practical road cuts
Ornamentation: Clan tattoos, contract tokens, ritual ash, beast-bond charms, and travel-earned trophies

Name: Thornkin
Markings: Growth rings, sap seams, and moss
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 30 years; typical lifespan 200 to 300 years, with rooted elders sometimes surviving much longer.
Typical Grooming: Seasonal pruning, cultivation, grafting, and removal of harmful growth
Ornamentation: Living flowers, moss, fungi, seedpods, woven vines, and cultivated seasonal displays

Name: Tyrikai
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 12 years; typical lifespan 70 to 100 years.
Typical Grooming: Short wiry hair, horns, and tail kept practical for heat and sudden movement
Ornamentation: Survival trophies, horn bands, scavenged metal, heat-resistant wraps, and clan marks

Name: Umbranauts
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 120 to 160 years.
Typical Grooming: Bodies kept contamination-free; sealed veilsuits meticulously cleaned and maintained
Ornamentation: Route, family, and contract markings stitched or etched onto veilsuits

Name: Unfaceted
Markings: Painterly blur, static, or missing facial features
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 120 to 150 years.
Typical Grooming: Strong silhouettes, deliberate asymmetry, veils, hair framing, and layered collars
Ornamentation: Perceptual anchors, bold asymmetrical pieces, masks, and recognizable personal motifs

Name: Vaelari
Brow Structure: Smooth and swept into horn base
Markings: Faint psychic motes and facial ridges
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 90 to 120 years.
Typical Grooming: Hairless or closely kept; horns and smooth skin surfaces carefully maintained
Ornamentation: Sleek dark garments, horn accents, psychic-light jewelry, and minimal geometric pieces

Name: Varnhallan
Markings: Scars, heat exposure, and work marks
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 20 years; typical lifespan 100 to 120 years.
Typical Grooming: Thick hair kept short or tightly bound away from tools, stone dust, and flame
Ornamentation: Work leathers, guild insignia, medallions, tool badges, and earned craft marks

Name: Veilborn
Markings: Spectral veins and broken reflective planes
Secondary Covering: Prismatic fragments and trailing veil matter
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 20 years; typical lifespan 100 to 180 years, depending on how well their bodies remain stabilized.
Typical Grooming: Unstable fragments aligned or bound where possible; little conventional grooming
Ornamentation: Anchoring ribbons, prismatic shards, stabilizing sigils, and objects that preserve identity

Name: Veithyn
Markings: Visible black veins and blurred outline
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 25 years; typical lifespan 160 to 220 years.
Typical Grooming: Smoke-like hair left drifting or loosely bound without suppressing its motion
Ornamentation: Dark layered garments, threshold charms, subdued metals, and watch-order insignia

Name: Velthask
Defensive Growth: Metallic cranial crest and facial spines
Complexion: Petrified gold, brass, ivory, or electrum
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 40 years; typical lifespan 350 to 500 years.
Typical Grooming: Carapace polished, crests displayed, and every visible surface maintained ceremonially
Ornamentation: Carapace-like formalwear, crowns, gemstone regalia, and rank-defining court symbols

Name: Vessels
Skin Texture: Patched composite, ceramic, or artificial flesh
Markings: Maker marks, seams, repairs, and inscriptions
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at fully formed when awakened; typical lifespan indefinitely while their core and body can be repaired.
Typical Grooming: Repairs maintained and often left visible as part of personal history
Ornamentation: Maker marks, seals, cords, embedded relics, patched materials, and chosen identity symbols
Status Indicators: Maker marks and quality of repairs

Name: Vexholmic
Complexion: Ash, iron-grey, scarred red, or dark bronze
Markings: Reinforced brow ridges and cranial grooves
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 15 years; typical lifespan 60 to 80 years.
Typical Grooming: Minimal martial grooming; nails, ridges, and equipment kept combat-ready
Ornamentation: Rank marks, battle titles, contract badges, disciplined armor, and earned weapon tokens

Name: Vitrexin
Markings: Visible colored sigils, veins, and compound marks
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at late teens; typical lifespan 80 to 140 years, with major variation caused by blood compounds and treatment.
Typical Grooming: Human-adjacent grooming adapted to protect or deliberately reveal compound markings
Ornamentation: Colored sigils, coded jewelry, serial markers, reclaimed names, and concealed ownership marks
Status Indicators: Pattern and color of bodily sigils

Name: Vok
Complexion: Coal-grey, dark steel, or volcanic black
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 25 years; typical lifespan 200 to 300 years.
Typical Grooming: Short practical grooming; vents, seams, and metallic hair kept clear of residue
Ornamentation: Calibration marks, forge tokens, heat-safe tools, and symbols of maintained systems
Status Indicators: Brightness of heat seams and pulse-lines

Name: Vorraki
Secondary Vision Traits: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.
Complexion: Olive-grey, charcoal, iron-brown, or deep bronze
Markings: Scars, campaign marks, and service tattoos
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 16 years; typical lifespan 60 to 80 years.
Typical Grooming: Hair and facial hair worn in disciplined braids, locks, or military cuts
Ornamentation: Campaign marks, service tattoos, battle honors, officer insignia, and oath-charter tokens

Name: Weftilestes
Complexion: Ivory, silver-grey, pale lapis, or iridescent
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 40 years; typical lifespan 200 to 300 years.
Typical Grooming: Spectral hair worn loose or arranged in deliberate geometric patterns
Ornamentation: Geometric jewelry, scholarly robes, tesseral symbols, and carefully curated arcane tools

Name: Zakariss
Jaw Structure: Heavy and capable of splitting wide
Defensive Growth: Crystalline secondary teeth and stone ridges
Complexion: Basalt black, storm-grey, or rune-lit bronze
Markings: Pulsing spiral sigils and unstable light seams
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 30 years; typical lifespan 250 to 400 years, though instability and warfare kill many earlier.
Typical Grooming: Sigils exposed, reinforced, and maintained; unstable seams bound rather than concealed
Ornamentation: Rune-bound armor, earned conquest sigils, dominion symbols, and seized Veil cores
Status Indicators: Earned sigils and stability of form

Name: Zhimeus
Markings: Spore dust, fungal staining, and fine facial veins
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 80 years; typical lifespan 500 to 700 years.
Typical Grooming: Filament or mycelial hair worn loose, dusted, braided, or cultivated with controlled growth
Ornamentation: Alchemical pendants, fungal materials, reagent vessels, bonework, and craft-earned titles

Name: Zyrrkhal
Skin Texture: Smooth stone, ceramic, or dark metal
Complexion: Cold ivory, ash-grey, basalt, or black marble
Markings: Carved geometric seams and architectural panels
Lifespan Average: Adulthood at 50 years; typical lifespan 800 years or more, with some surviving for several millennia.
Typical Grooming: Stone or ceramic surfaces and carved seams kept immaculate and unchanged
Ornamentation: Architectural robes, geometric panels, office regalia, and symbols of unbroken law
Status Indicators: Integrity and complexity of carved form
